pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly uses this ID when seeding the patient data via hr_couch_put.
setup_task.sh explicitly uses this ID when seeding the visit data via hr_couch_put.
Task description requires changing the status to 'Discharged', and verifier.py enforces this exact string.
Task description requires the date '01/17/2025', which corresponds to the ISO date fragment '2025-01-17' checked by verifier.py.
Task description explicitly instructs the user to set the Discharge Date to '01/17/2025'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data for patient Maria Santos. The setup script directly injects the patient record with ID 'patient_p1_200001' and an 'Admitted' visit record with ID 'visit_p1_200001'. The task instructions and verifier correctly expect the visit status to be updated to 'Discharged' and the end date to be set to '01/17/2025' (matching ISO fragment '2025-01-17').
